title: Build OTC multi-tier proposal: Tier-A Open + Tier-B plain Whitelist (auto-appended addToWhitelist)
notes: Phase A — exercises dexe_proposal_build_token_sale_multi with plain `Whitelist` participation. Plain whitelist tiers must auto-append an addToWhitelist({tierId, users, uri}) action targeting the new tier id (latestTierId + index + 1). Tier-A is open so the addToWhitelist call must reference Tier-B's id only.

args.proposalDescription: Phase A swarm — Open + plain Whitelist auto-addToWhitelist

successCriteria.check: built.actions length == 3 (1 approve + createTiers + addToWhitelist auto-appended for Tier-B)
actions[2].data starts with 0xce6c2d91 (addToWhitelist selector) and references tierId 2 (latestTierId 0 + index 1 + 1)
built.metadata.changes.proposedChanges.derivedMerkleRoots length == 0 (no merkle tier in this scenario)
